lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for intermediate opinion exchange, refusal, alternatives, consensus, and follow-up interaction.

lexemeSets.name: Adult L2 intermediate connected writing vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 中級まとまりのある作文語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for intermediate paragraphs, summaries, opinion emails, event reports, and revision logs.

lexemeSets.name: Adult L2 intermediate authentic-input vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 中級生教材入力語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for intermediate article reading, listening inference, casual reduction, sentence mining, and example reuse boundaries.

lexemeSets.name: Native high-school data and media literacy vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 高校データ・メディア読解語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for graph claims, infographic captions, data caveats, and media framing in high-school Japanese.

lexemeSets.name: Native high-school inquiry interview and note vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 高校探究インタビュー・ノート語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for inquiry interview design, evidence tagging, source trails, and stance-shift listening.

lexemeSets.name: Native high-school argument quality vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 高校論証評価語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for causal claims, analogy tests, statistical caveats, counterargument revision, and method register.

lexemeSets.name: Native high-school comparative literature and culture vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 高校比較文学・言語文化語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for narrator reliability, poetic diction, kanbun allusion, reception caveats, and classical quotation notes.

lexemeSets.name: Native high-school publication ethics vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 高校発信倫理語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for public abstracts, accessibility copyediting, bibliography audits, and source transparency notes.

lexemeSets.name: Adult L2 advanced media, policy, and stance vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 上級メディア・政策・スタンス語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for JLPT N2/N1 media, policy, stance, caveat, and evidence reading.

lexemeSets.name: Adult L2 executive decision and risk vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 上級意思決定・リスク語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for BJT J1/J1+ executive risk, scenario, board Q&A, and decision memo topics.

lexemeSets.name: Adult L2 compliance, accountability, and change vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 上級コンプライアンス・説明責任語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for BJT crisis, compliance, policy exceptions, change announcements, and accountability frames.

lexemeSets.name: Adult L2 advanced discourse and self-observation vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 上級談話・自己観察語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original project-authored seed vocabulary for advanced self-observation, native feedback, and corpus phrase mining.

lexemeSets.name: Adult L2 high-stakes mediation vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 上級異文化調整語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for BJT J2-J1+ cross-cultural mediation, disagreement, expectation repair, and high-stakes facework.

lexemeSets.name: Native early oral story discourse vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 低学年物語発話語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for early story questions, character voice, oral retell, and pair-response routines.

lexemeSets.name: Native early reading fluency and response vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 低学年音読・感想語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for echo reading, punctuation pauses, story scenes, favorite-detail reasons, and evidence response.

lexemeSets.name: Native early inquiry and visual-note vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 低学年探究・図表メモ語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for picture evidence, captions, tables, source cards, visual notes, and early inquiry reports.

lexemeSets.name: Native elementary sentence and paragraph control vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 小学校文・段落制御語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for adding details, connector choice, sentence strips, topic sentences, and paragraph focus.

lexemeSets.name: Native elementary register and word-choice vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 小学校文体・語選択語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for polite requests, feeling-word intensity, precise description, audience match, and revision for reader effect.

lexemeSets.name: Adult L2 beginner script and input-transfer vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 初級文字・入力転移語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for kana retrieval, sound-mark listening, katakana categories, and digital input transfer.

lexemeSets.name: Adult L2 beginner interaction and repair vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 初級やりとり・修復語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for survival repair, WH-answer slots, aizuchi, short exchanges, and clarification under beginner load.

lexemeSets.name: Adult L2 beginner short-message literacy vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 初級短文リテラシー語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for short notices, forms, schedules, emails, and beginner reading-writing transfer.

lexemeSets.name: Adult L2 N4 daily-event connection vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: N4日常出来事接続語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for N4 reason, comparison, invitation, refusal, schedule change, and experience-writing nodes.

lexemeSets.name: Adult L2 beginner workplace bridge vocabulary
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 初級職場橋渡し語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for BJT J5/J4 workplace confirmation, short reports, delays, checklist problems, and supervisor clarification.

lexemeSets.name: Native prefecture and map-reading words
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 都道府県と地図を読む語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for reading prefecture-name kanji in maps, addresses, social-studies reports, and informational texts.

lexemeSets.name: Adult L2 beginner verb-form pattern words
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 初級動詞活用パターン語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for dictionary-form recognition, verb group routines, polite forms, and te-form construction.

lexemeSets.name: Adult L2 beginner adjective predicate words
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 初級形容詞述語語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for contrasting i-adjective and na-adjective predicate behavior in beginner sentences.

lexemeSets.name: Adult L2 beginner location and existence words
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 初級存在・場所語彙

items.gloss: exist or have for inanimate referents

lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for ni/de location contrasts, existence sentences, and beginner object/person-location descriptions.

lexemeSets.name: Adult L2 beginner request-form words
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 初級依頼表現語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for te kudasai requests, survival repair, repetition requests, and softened beginner interaction.

lexemeSets.name: Adult L2 N3 connector and clause-form words
lexemeSets.japaneseName: N3接続・節構成語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for N3 condition, reason, contrast, concession, and embedded-question clause work.

lexemeSets.name: Adult L2 N3 nominalization and embedded-question words
lexemeSets.japaneseName: N3名詞節・埋め込み疑問語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for reporting uncertainty, knowledge, perception, and evaluation inside larger N3 clauses.

lexemeSets.name: Adult L2 passive, causative, and accountability words
lexemeSets.japaneseName: 受身・使役・責任視点語彙
lexemeSets.notes: Original seed vocabulary for passive affect, causative permission/coercion, causative-passive pressure, and accountability perspective.
